outlook.summary: Market pinned near weekly gamma flip at 23400 with positive dealer gamma (2.64B) creating stability. Spot hovers just above equilibrium. 0DTE PCR of 2.36 indicates hedging pressure while reverse smirk skew (0.84) shows call demand. Call walls at 24300-24400 cap upside, put support at 23200 limits downside.

levels.motivazione: Weekly gamma flip (23400.04) coincides exactly with max pain (23400). Massive put OI (478). Spot pinned 81 points above - dealers suppress movement.
Confluent call OI: Weekly 471 + Monthly 412. Strong dual-expiry resistance ceiling. Reverse smirk validates call premium.
Largest 0DTE put OI (563). Primary intraday support. High PCR 2.36 confirms hedging interest.
Highest weekly call OI (531). Secondary resistance above 24300 confluence zone.
Unusual monthly put OI (597) above spot creates dealer hedging friction. Acts as resistance despite put positioning.
0DTE max pain level 1.7% above spot. Price magnet for settlement pinning.
